The '''''Harramin''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]].

==History==
It was seized by the [[Yevetha]] when they captured the [[Black Fifteen|Black-15]] shipyard and other [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]] military assets, during their successful revolt against Imperial rule, eight months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

Twelve years later, she served as one of the control ships from which the [[slave circuit]] system devised by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Sil Sorannan]] and his escape committee was initiated, recapturing the Black Fleet for the Empire.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Harramin'' has sometimes been taken to be a misprint of the name of [[Harridan (starship)|''Harridan'']], mentioned in ''[[Before the Storm]]'' as a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] assigned to Black Sword Command. However, there seems to be no [[canon]] evidence for this, especially as ''Harridan'' had been pulled away from N'zoth three weeks before the Yevethan revolt.

==Appearances==
